faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in Harlem?
faqs.answer: Our wasp removal services in Harlem range from $350 to $550, depending on nest size, location, and accessibility. We provide upfront pricing with no hidden fees and offer free estimates for all Harlem residents.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Harlem?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Harlem. Most wasp nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, and we're available for emergency situations when wasps pose an immediate threat to your family or business.

faqs.question: Are wasp removal treatments safe for Harlem brownstones and older buildings?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted treatments specifically designed for Harlem's historic brownstones and pre-war buildings. Our methods effectively eliminate wasps without damaging facades, masonry, or architectural details.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Harlem?
faqs.answer: Harlem properties commonly encounter yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. These species build nests in eaves, attics, wall voids, and trees. Our technicians are trained to identify and safely remove all wasp species found in Manhattan.
